title: Tahini Crusted Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional tacos, featuring a crunchy tahini crust and a side of fresh salsa.

ingredients.name: Corn tortillas
ingredients.notes: preferably handmade or store-bought corn tortillas

ingredients.name: Tahini paste
ingredients.notes: make sure to mix with a little water to achieve the right consistency

ingredients.name: Chili powder
ingredients.notes: mild or hot, depends on your taste

instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together tahini paste, lime juice, cumin, chili powder, and salt.
2. Heat about 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Dip each corn tortilla into the tahini mixture, coating both sides evenly.
4. Place the coated tortillas in the skillet and fry for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy.
5. Remove the tortillas from the skillet and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. In a separate skillet, heat a little bit of oil over medium heat.
7. Add diced tomatoes and cook for about 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
8. Add shredded lettuce and diced avocado to the skillet and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the lettuce is slightly wilted.
9. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
10. Assemble the tacos by placing a few spoonfuls of the lettuce mixture onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
11. Garnish with fresh cilantro, lime wedges, and your favorite toppings.
